title: The Sunken Grotto of Grell's Hoard
theme: Kobold den with goblin mercenaries and ancient artifact
background: Local merchant caravan was ambushed. Survivors report a blue gemstone taken. A scholar recognizes it as a potential Shard of Kaelas (an ancient artifact). The PCs are hired to recover it and eliminate the threat.

objectives.description: The gemstone must be taken from Grell's lair and returned intact
objectives.success_condition: Shard in party possession and exit grotto

objectives.description: Destroy or drive out the kobold warlord. Optional but recommended to prevent future attacks.
Learn who hired the goblins as mercenaries. Investigation opportunity.
objectives.success_condition: Party discovers the identity of the employer

entrance.name: Grotto Mouth
entrance.description_cues: Damp cave opening, recent drag marks, smell of sulfur and copper

goblin_barracks.name: Barracks
goblin_barracks.description_cues: Ramshackle tents and bedrolls, crude weapons racks, gambling table with coins scattered

encounters.name: Goblin Sentries (easy)
encounters.notes: Goblins are gambling; startled by intrusion. Boss (Captain Jerk) will try to flee if below 5 HP.

main_hall.name: Grand Hall
main_hall.description_cues: Cavernous space, pillars carved to resemble kobold heads, hearth with dying fire, skull totems

encounters.name: Kobold Patrol (medium)
encounters.notes: Alerted by barracks noise if that encounter wasn't silent. Sorcerer hangs back and casts.

hazards.trigger: Pressure plate, DC 14 Perception to spot
hazards.effect: 15 ft pit, 2d6 fall damage; can be jumped with DC 13 Athletics

armory.name: Armory
armory.description_cues: Racks of javelins and clubs, broken swords, leather armor scraps, sharpening stones

treasury.name: Treasury
treasury.description_cues: Coins stacked in corners, scattered gems, bolts of silk fabric, the Shard of Kaelas rests on an obsidian pedestal

hazards.effect: Explodes for 4d6 force damage in 15 ft radius, DC 14 Dex save for half
hazards.disarm: DC 15 Arcana check or dispel magic

treasure.description: Blue gemstone, glows faintly in darkness

grell_throne.name: Throne Chamber
grell_throne.description_cues: Crude throne of bone and leather, tapestry of a battle scene, Grell's personal effects scattered about, faint draconic runes on walls

encounters.name: Grell, the Kobold Warlord (hard)

enemies.name: Grell
special_abilities: Draconic Bloodline: Resistance to fire damage
Tactical Retreat: Reaction to disengage when bloodied
Call to War: Summons 2d4 Kobold reinforcements on second round (rounds 2+)
enemies.personality: Proud, strategic, will parley briefly but fight viciously

encounters.notes: Grell fights to the death unless reduced to <10 HP, then attempts escape north through secret passage. Has knowledge of the goblin employer (Mage named Vex, details optional).
dialogue_cues: Opener: Dismissive of PCs, confident in superiority
Bloodied: More respectful, offers parley if they're 'worthy'

hazards.trigger: Push tapestry or find with DC 14 Perception

escape_tunnel.name: Secret Escape Tunnel
escape_tunnel.description_cues: Narrow, roughly hewn passage, echoes of running water, leads upward

hazards.effect: DC 14 Dex save or take 2d6 bludgeoning as rocks fall; passage becomes impassable

cave_exit.name: Mountain Exit
cave_exit.description_cues: Narrow cave mouth opens to mountainside, moonlight streams in, view of surrounding valley

hazards.effect: 100 ft drop, 10d6 fall damage, DC 14 Athletics to find safe footing
hazards.note: Grell will attempt to jump down (he survives; kobolds are hardy)

grell.name: Grell
grell.title: Kobold Warlord
grell.personality_sketch: Ambitious, tactical, believes himself descended from a dragon. Respects strength and combat prowess. Brutal to subordinates but capable of grudging respect for worthy foes.
knowledge: Hired by a mage named Vex to acquire the Shard for unknown purposes
Believes the Shard amplifies draconic power
Plans to use it to unite all kobold clans under his rule

captain_jerk.name: Captain Jerk
captain_jerk.title: Goblin Mercenary Captain
captain_jerk.personality_sketch: Greedy, talks too much when scared, loves gold and gambling, cowardly but desperate to maintain rank
knowledge: Details about Vex's appearance: tiefling woman, wears purple robes, has a silvery dagger
Vex paid handsomely but refused to take the Shard herself
Something about Vex needing it 'before the eclipse'

vex.name: Vex
vex.title: Mysterious Mage (off-stage NPC)
vex.role: Hidden antagonist / quest hook for future
vex.personality_sketch: Cultured, patient, mysterious. Views mercenaries and warlords as disposable tools.
vex.appearance_notes: Purple robes, silvery dagger, cool demeanor
vex.plot_hook: Interrogating Captain Jerk or Grell can reveal her involvement; opens door for future adventure

pacing_notes.session_1: Barracks encounter → Main Hall optional encounter (or full combat) → decision on next move
pacing_notes.session_2: Armory exploration → Treasury glyph puzzle → escape sequence
pacing_notes.session_3: Grell throne confrontation → chase through escape tunnel → final confrontation or escape

difficulty_scaling.easy: Skip Encounter 2 (Main Hall patrol) or reduce Grell's HP to 40 and elite guards to 15 HP
difficulty_scaling.hard: Add 2 additional Kobold Sorcerers to Grell's throne room; increase Encounter 2 Sorcerer spell slots; add glyph trap in Armory

reward_summary.magical_items: +1 Longsword, +1 Greatsword, Amulet of Health, Shard of Kaelas
